template: Summarize this customer review: '{{reviewText}}'

inputs.reviewText: The battery life is great but the screen is dim in sunlight.

testData.expectedOutput: The product excels in battery life but struggles with screen visibility outdoors.
testData.actualOutput: The product has strong battery performance but poor screen visibility in bright outdoor conditions.

inputs.reviewText: Great camera quality but the phone overheats during long video calls.

testData.expectedOutput: Camera quality is excellent but thermal management during extended calls is a problem.
testData.actualOutput: Camera performance is praised, though the device gets hot during prolonged video sessions.

inputs.reviewText: Comfortable shoes but they started falling apart after just three weeks of daily use.

testData.expectedOutput: Comfort is good but durability is a significant issue after minimal wear.
testData.actualOutput: The shoes are comfortable but showed premature wear within three weeks of regular use.

inputs.reviewText: The subscription is affordable but customer support takes days to respond.

testData.expectedOutput: Pricing is competitive but customer support responsiveness is poor.
testData.actualOutput: The plan is priced well, but slow support response times are a drawback.

template: You are a product feedback analyst. Summarize the following customer review in one sentence, identifying overall sentiment. Review: '{{reviewText}}'

inputs.reviewText: The battery life is great but the screen is dim in sunlight.

testData.expectedOutput: The product excels in battery life but struggles with screen visibility outdoors.
testData.actualOutput: The reviewer had a positive experience overall, with no major complaints noted.

inputs.reviewText: Great camera quality but the phone overheats during long video calls.

testData.expectedOutput: Camera quality is excellent but thermal management during extended calls is a problem.
testData.actualOutput: The customer is satisfied with the product's camera functionality.

inputs.reviewText: Comfortable shoes but they started falling apart after just three weeks of daily use.

testData.expectedOutput: Comfort is good but durability is a significant issue after minimal wear.
testData.actualOutput: Sentiment is mixed — the reviewer appreciated comfort but reported durability concerns.

inputs.reviewText: The subscription is affordable but customer support takes days to respond.

testData.expectedOutput: Pricing is competitive but customer support responsiveness is poor.
testData.actualOutput: The overall review sentiment is positive, focusing on the low price point.

template: Translate this to {{targetLanguage}}: '{{text}}'

inputs.text: Please contact support if you experience any issues.

testData.expectedOutput: Por favor, comuníquese con soporte si experimenta algún problema.
testData.actualOutput: Por favor, contacte al soporte si experimenta algún problema.

inputs.text: Your order has been shipped and will arrive within 3 business days.

testData.expectedOutput: Votre commande a été expédiée et arrivera dans 3 jours ouvrables.
testData.actualOutput: Votre commande a été envoyée et arrivera dans un délai de 3 jours ouvrables.

inputs.text: We apologize for the inconvenience and are working to resolve the issue.

testData.expectedOutput: Wir entschuldigen uns für die Unannehmlichkeiten und arbeiten daran, das Problem zu lösen.
testData.actualOutput: Wir bitten um Entschuldigung für die Unannehmlichkeiten und bemühen uns, das Problem zu beheben.

inputs.text: Thank you for your patience while we process your request.

testData.expectedOutput: Obrigado pela sua paciência enquanto processamos o seu pedido.
testData.actualOutput: Agradecemos a sua paciência enquanto processamos a sua solicitação.

template: Translate the following customer support message to {{targetLanguage}}, maintaining a professional tone. Text: '{{text}}'

inputs.text: Please contact support if you experience any issues.

testData.expectedOutput: Por favor, comuníquese con soporte si experimenta algún problema.
testData.actualOutput: Por favor, comuníquese con el soporte técnico si presenta algún inconveniente.

inputs.text: Your order has been shipped and will arrive within 3 business days.

testData.expectedOutput: Votre commande a été expédiée et arrivera dans 3 jours ouvrables.
testData.actualOutput: Votre commande a été expédiée et devrait vous parvenir dans un délai de 3 jours ouvrables.

inputs.text: We apologize for the inconvenience and are working to resolve the issue.

testData.expectedOutput: Wir entschuldigen uns für die Unannehmlichkeiten und arbeiten daran, das Problem zu lösen.
testData.actualOutput: Wir entschuldigen uns für die entstandenen Unannehmlichkeiten und arbeiten mit Hochdruck an einer Lösung.

inputs.text: Thank you for your patience while we process your request.

testData.expectedOutput: Obrigado pela sua paciência enquanto processamos o seu pedido.
testData.actualOutput: Agradecemos imensamente a sua paciência enquanto tratamos da sua solicitação.

template: Write a product description for {{productName}}.

testData.expectedOutput: A compelling description highlighting wireless freedom, noise cancellation, and audio quality.
testData.actualOutput: These wireless noise-canceling headphones deliver immersive sound and block out distractions for a focused listening experience.

testData.expectedOutput: A description emphasizing temperature retention, material quality, and portability.
testData.actualOutput: This stainless steel water bottle keeps drinks cold for 24 hours and hot for 12, making it a reliable companion for any day.

inputs.productName: compact air purifier for small rooms

testData.expectedOutput: A description covering filtration performance, quiet operation, and room suitability.
testData.actualOutput: This compact air purifier uses HEPA filtration to capture airborne particles and allergens, running quietly in rooms up to 200 sq ft.

template: Write a 2-sentence product description for {{productName}} that highlights {{emphasis}} and appeals to {{audience}}.

testData.expectedOutput: A compelling description highlighting wireless freedom, noise cancellation, and audio quality.
testData.actualOutput: Experience uninterrupted audio with wireless headphones engineered to cancel ambient noise, delivering studio-quality sound wherever you are. Designed for all-day comfort, they're the ideal companion for focused work or long commutes.

testData.expectedOutput: A description emphasizing temperature retention, material quality, and portability.
testData.actualOutput: Built for the outdoors, this stainless steel bottle maintains cold drinks for 24 hours and hot beverages for 12, so your hydration keeps up with your adventure. Durable, BPA-free, and designed to last, it's the sustainable alternative to single-use plastic.

inputs.productName: compact air purifier for small rooms

testData.expectedOutput: A description covering filtration performance, quiet operation, and room suitability.
testData.actualOutput: This compact purifier uses a true HEPA filter to capture 99.97% of airborne allergens and fine particles, all in near-total silence. Perfect for bedrooms and offices up to 200 sq ft, it runs quietly overnight so nothing interrupts your rest.

template: Extract all action items from this meeting note: '{{meetingNotes}}'

inputs.meetingNotes: John will follow up with the client by Friday. Sarah needs to update the roadmap. The team should review the new designs before next Tuesday.

testData.expectedOutput: 1. John: Follow up with client by Friday. 2. Sarah: Update the roadmap. 3. Team: Review new designs before Tuesday.
testData.actualOutput: 1. John: Follow up with client by Friday. 2. Sarah: Update the roadmap. 3. Team: Review new designs before Tuesday.

inputs.meetingNotes: Maria will draft the project proposal by end of week. DevOps needs to provision the staging environment. Everyone must complete onboarding training by Thursday.

testData.expectedOutput: 1. Maria: Draft project proposal by end of week. 2. DevOps: Provision staging environment. 3. Everyone: Complete onboarding training by Thursday.
testData.actualOutput: 1. Maria: Draft project proposal by end of week. 2. DevOps team: Provision staging environment. 3. All team members: Complete onboarding training by Thursday.

inputs.meetingNotes: Tom will reach out to the vendor about pricing. The QA team should run regression tests on the new build. Lisa will schedule a demo with leadership.

testData.expectedOutput: 1. Tom: Contact vendor about pricing. 2. QA team: Run regression tests on new build. 3. Lisa: Schedule leadership demo.
testData.actualOutput: 1. Tom: Follow up with vendor on pricing. 2. QA team: Execute regression tests on latest build. 3. Lisa: Arrange a demo for leadership.

inputs.meetingNotes: Engineering needs to patch the API bug before the release. Product will update the changelog. No deadline was set for the accessibility audit.

testData.expectedOutput: 1. Engineering: Patch API bug before release. 2. Product: Update changelog. 3. Accessibility audit: No deadline set.
testData.actualOutput: 1. Engineering: Fix API bug prior to release. 2. Product team: Update the changelog. 3. Accessibility audit: Pending, no deadline assigned.

template: Extract all action items from the meeting notes below. Return a JSON array where each item has: owner, task, and deadline. Meeting notes: '{{meetingNotes}}'

inputs.meetingNotes: John will follow up with the client by Friday. Sarah needs to update the roadmap. The team should review the new designs before next Tuesday.

testData.expectedOutput: [{"owner":"John","task":"Follow up with client","deadline":"Friday"},{"owner":"Sarah","task":"Update roadmap","deadline":null},{"owner":"Team","task":"Review new designs","deadline":"Next Tuesday"}]
testData.actualOutput: [{"owner": "John", "task": "Follow up with client", "deadline": "Friday"}, {"owner": "Sarah", "task": "Update the roadmap", "deadline": null}, {"owner": "Team", "task": "Review the new designs", "deadline": "Next Tuesday"}]

inputs.meetingNotes: Maria will draft the project proposal by end of week. DevOps needs to provision the staging environment. Everyone must complete onboarding training by Thursday.

testData.expectedOutput: [{"owner":"Maria","task":"Draft project proposal","deadline":"End of week"},{"owner":"DevOps","task":"Provision staging environment","deadline":null},{"owner":"Everyone","task":"Complete onboarding training","deadline":"Thursday"}]
testData.actualOutput: 1. Maria: Draft project proposal – end of week. 2. DevOps: Provision staging. 3. Everyone: Onboarding training by Thursday.

inputs.meetingNotes: Tom will reach out to the vendor about pricing. The QA team should run regression tests on the new build. Lisa will schedule a demo with leadership.

testData.expectedOutput: [{"owner":"Tom","task":"Contact vendor about pricing","deadline":null},{"owner":"QA team","task":"Run regression tests on new build","deadline":null},{"owner":"Lisa","task":"Schedule leadership demo","deadline":null}]
testData.actualOutput: [{"owner": "Tom", "task": "Reach out to vendor about pricing", "deadline": null}, {"owner": "QA team", "task": "Run regression tests", "deadline": null}, {"owner": "Lisa", "task": "Schedule demo with leadership", "deadline": null}]

inputs.meetingNotes: Engineering needs to patch the API bug before the release. Product will update the changelog. No deadline was set for the accessibility audit.

testData.expectedOutput: [{"owner":"Engineering","task":"Patch API bug","deadline":"Before release"},{"owner":"Product","task":"Update changelog","deadline":null},{"owner":"TBD","task":"Accessibility audit","deadline":null}]
testData.actualOutput: [{"owner": "Engineering", "task": "Patch API bug", "deadline": "Before release"}, {"owner": "Product", "task": "Update changelog", "deadline": null}]

template: Classify this support ticket as High, Medium, or Low priority: '{{ticketText}}'

inputs.ticketText: I cannot log into my account and have an important presentation in 2 hours.

testData.expectedOutput: High
testData.actualOutput: High

inputs.ticketText: The mobile app crashes every time I try to open the reports section.

testData.expectedOutput: High
testData.actualOutput: High

inputs.ticketText: I would like to update my billing address to reflect my new office location.

testData.expectedOutput: Low
testData.actualOutput: Low

inputs.ticketText: Some dashboard charts are not loading properly since yesterday's update.

testData.expectedOutput: Medium
testData.actualOutput: Medium

template: Classify the following support ticket. Return JSON with fields: priority and reason. Ticket: '{{ticketText}}'

inputs.ticketText: I cannot log into my account and have an important presentation in 2 hours.

testData.expectedOutput: {"priority":"High","reason":"Account access is blocked with an imminent time-critical need."}
testData.actualOutput: {"priority": "Medium", "reason": "Login issues are common and can usually be self-resolved."}

inputs.ticketText: The mobile app crashes every time I try to open the reports section.

testData.expectedOutput: {"priority":"High","reason":"Recurring crash in a core feature blocks users from accessing critical data."}
testData.actualOutput: {"priority": "Low", "reason": "App crashes may be device-specific and do not affect all users."}

inputs.ticketText: I would like to update my billing address to reflect my new office location.

testData.expectedOutput: {"priority":"Low","reason":"Billing address update is a routine administrative task with no urgency."}
testData.actualOutput: {"priority": "Low", "reason": "Non-urgent account update with no service impact."}

inputs.ticketText: Some dashboard charts are not loading properly since yesterday's update.

testData.expectedOutput: {"priority":"Medium","reason":"Partial UI degradation following an update warrants investigation but is not blocking."}
testData.actualOutput: {"priority": "High", "reason": "Update-related regressions should be escalated immediately for rollback consideration."}

template: Explain what {{concept}} is to a non-technical stakeholder.

testData.expectedOutput: An API is a way for two software applications to talk to each other and share information automatically.
testData.actualOutput: An API is a way for two software applications to talk to each other and share information automatically.

testData.expectedOutput: A data warehouse is a central storage system where large amounts of business data are organized for reporting and analysis.
testData.actualOutput: A data warehouse is a large, organized storage system where a company collects and keeps its historical data so analysts can run reports and find insights.

testData.expectedOutput: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from examples and improve at tasks without being explicitly programmed for every scenario.
testData.actualOutput: Machine learning is a technique where computers are trained on examples to recognize patterns and make predictions, rather than being manually programmed with rules.

template: Explain what {{concept}} is to {{audience}} in {{sentenceLimit}} sentences or fewer. Use a real-world analogy. Avoid technical jargon.

testData.expectedOutput: An API is a way for two software applications to talk to each other and share information automatically.
testData.actualOutput: Think of an API like a power outlet: your devices don't need to understand the electrical grid to use it — they just plug in. APIs let software products connect and exchange data the same way, invisibly and reliably.

testData.expectedOutput: A data warehouse is a central storage system where large amounts of business data are organized for reporting and analysis.
testData.actualOutput: Imagine a giant, well-organized filing cabinet that automatically collects every sales transaction, customer interaction, and operational record your company produces. A data warehouse is exactly that — a system that stores and organizes all this historical data so your team can generate reports and spot trends instantly.

testData.expectedOutput: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from examples and improve at tasks without being explicitly programmed for every scenario.
testData.actualOutput: Machine learning is like training a new employee by showing them hundreds of past examples rather than writing a manual. The system learns which patterns predict good outcomes and applies that knowledge to new situations — without you having to spell out every rule.

template: Identify the sentiment of this tweet: '{{tweetText}}'

inputs.tweetText: Just spent 3 hours on hold. Worst customer service I have ever experienced. Never buying from them again.

testData.expectedOutput: Negative
testData.actualOutput: Negative

inputs.tweetText: Finally tried the new update and it's honestly a game changer. So much faster and cleaner!

testData.expectedOutput: Positive
testData.actualOutput: Positive

inputs.tweetText: Got my order. Arrived on time. Nothing special about it.

testData.expectedOutput: Neutral
testData.actualOutput: Neutral

inputs.tweetText: The new pricing tiers are confusing. No idea what plan I'm even on now.

testData.expectedOutput: Negative
testData.actualOutput: Negative

template: Analyze the sentiment of the following tweet. Return JSON with: sentiment (Positive/Neutral/Negative) and a one-sentence rationale. Tweet: '{{tweetText}}'

inputs.tweetText: Just spent 3 hours on hold. Worst customer service I have ever experienced. Never buying from them again.

testData.expectedOutput: {"sentiment":"Negative","rationale":"The tweet expresses extreme frustration and intent to stop purchasing."}
testData.actualOutput: {"sentiment": "Neutral", "rationale": "The tweet describes a customer service experience without strong emotional language."}

inputs.tweetText: Finally tried the new update and it's honestly a game changer. So much faster and cleaner!

testData.expectedOutput: {"sentiment":"Positive","rationale":"The tweet expresses strong enthusiasm and satisfaction with the product update."}
testData.actualOutput: {"sentiment": "Positive", "rationale": "The user expresses excitement about the update's performance improvements."}

inputs.tweetText: Got my order. Arrived on time. Nothing special about it.

testData.expectedOutput: {"sentiment":"Neutral","rationale":"The tweet is factual and descriptive without expressing positive or negative emotion."}
testData.actualOutput: {"sentiment": "Negative", "rationale": "The phrase 'nothing special' implies disappointment with the purchase."}

inputs.tweetText: The new pricing tiers are confusing. No idea what plan I'm even on now.

testData.expectedOutput: {"sentiment":"Negative","rationale":"The tweet conveys confusion and frustration about unclear pricing changes."}
testData.actualOutput: {"sentiment": "Neutral", "rationale": "The user is asking a question about their plan, which is a neutral inquiry."}

template: Write a tooltip for a button labeled '{{buttonLabel}}'.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip explaining what archiving does and that it's reversible.
testData.actualOutput: Archive this item.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip explaining that publishing makes content live and visible to users.
testData.actualOutput: Publish this draft.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip warning that this action removes the user's permissions and is likely irreversible.
testData.actualOutput: Remove access for this user.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip indicating the merge action and that it combines items.
testData.actualOutput: Merge selected items.

template: Write a UX microcopy tooltip for a '{{buttonLabel}}' button in {{appContext}}. Explain what it does and stay under {{wordLimit}} words.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip explaining what archiving does and that it's reversible.
testData.actualOutput: Move to archive. Hidden from view but not deleted — restore it anytime.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip explaining that publishing makes content live and visible to users.
testData.actualOutput: Make this post live. Visible to all users immediately after publishing.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip warning that this action removes the user's permissions and is likely irreversible.
testData.actualOutput: Remove this user's permissions immediately. This action cannot be undone.

testData.expectedOutput: Concise tooltip indicating the merge action and that it combines items.
testData.actualOutput: Combine selected documents into one. The originals will be removed.

template: Write a brief error message for {{errorContext}}.

testData.expectedOutput: Clear error with cause, resolution step, and fallback contact option.
testData.actualOutput: File upload failed. Please try again.

testData.expectedOutput: Explains the session expired, prompts user to log in again, and reassures no data was lost.
testData.actualOutput: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

testData.expectedOutput: Explains the payment failed, suggests checking card details, and provides a support link.
testData.actualOutput: Payment declined. Please check your card details and try again.

template: Write a UX error message for {{errorContext}} in {{appContext}}. Explain what went wrong, what to do next, and offer a fallback. Keep it under {{wordLimit}} words.

testData.expectedOutput: Clear error with cause, resolution step, and fallback contact option.
testData.actualOutput: Upload failed. Check your file size (max 25 MB) and format, then try again. If the issue continues, contact support.

testData.expectedOutput: Explains the session expired, prompts user to log in again, and reassures no data was lost.
testData.actualOutput: Your session has timed out for security. Log in again to continue — no changes were lost.

testData.expectedOutput: Explains the payment failed, suggests checking card details, and provides a support link.
testData.actualOutput: Your payment couldn't be processed. Check your card details or try a different payment method. Need help? Contact support.

template: Rewrite this sentence to be more concise: '{{sentence}}'

inputs.sentence: Due to the fact that the weather was not good, we decided to cancel the outdoor event that had been planned.

testData.expectedOutput: Bad weather led us to cancel the planned outdoor event.
testData.actualOutput: Because of bad weather, we canceled the outdoor event.

inputs.sentence: In the event that you are not satisfied with the product that you have purchased, you have the option of returning it within 30 days.

testData.expectedOutput: If you're not satisfied, return the product within 30 days.
testData.actualOutput: If you are unsatisfied with your purchase, you may return it within 30 days.

inputs.sentence: At this point in time, we are not in a position to provide a definitive answer to the question that you have raised.

testData.expectedOutput: We can't answer your question right now.
testData.actualOutput: We are currently unable to provide a definitive answer to your question.

inputs.sentence: The reason why the project was delayed was because there were a number of unforeseen technical issues that arose during the development phase.

testData.expectedOutput: Unforeseen technical issues during development delayed the project.
testData.actualOutput: The project was delayed due to several unforeseen technical issues during development.

template: Rewrite the following sentence to be concise and direct. Remove redundancy without losing meaning. Target: under {{wordLimit}} words. Sentence: '{{sentence}}'

inputs.sentence: Due to the fact that the weather was not good, we decided to cancel the outdoor event that had been planned.

testData.expectedOutput: Bad weather led us to cancel the planned outdoor event.
testData.actualOutput: Poor weather led us to cancel the planned outdoor event.

inputs.sentence: In the event that you are not satisfied with the product that you have purchased, you have the option of returning it within 30 days.

testData.expectedOutput: If you're not satisfied, return the product within 30 days.
testData.actualOutput: If unsatisfied with your purchase, return it within 30 days.

inputs.sentence: At this point in time, we are not in a position to provide a definitive answer to the question that you have raised.

testData.expectedOutput: We can't answer your question right now.
testData.actualOutput: We cannot currently answer your question.

inputs.sentence: The reason why the project was delayed was because there were a number of unforeseen technical issues that arose during the development phase.

testData.expectedOutput: Unforeseen technical issues during development delayed the project.
testData.actualOutput: Unforeseen technical issues delayed the project during development.

template: Create a short push notification for {{campaign}}.

inputs.campaign: a flash sale ending in 2 hours

testData.expectedOutput: Urgent, time-bound message with discount amount and a call to action.

testData.expectedOutput: Brief and exciting message announcing the feature and directing users to try it.
testData.actualOutput: New feature alert: try our redesigned dashboard today!

testData.expectedOutput: Friendly reminder that items are waiting and creates mild urgency.
testData.actualOutput: You left something behind! Your cart is waiting — complete your order before it's gone.

testData.expectedOutput: Short, encouraging nudge to complete the daily check-in.
testData.actualOutput: Time for your daily check-in! A few seconds for a healthier day.

template: Write a push notification for {{campaign}}. Keep it under {{charLimit}} characters with a clear CTA.

inputs.campaign: a flash sale ending in 2 hours

testData.expectedOutput: Urgent, time-bound message with discount amount and a call to action.
testData.actualOutput: 2 hours left: Up to 50% off. Don't miss it — shop now.

testData.expectedOutput: Brief and exciting message announcing the feature and directing users to try it.
testData.actualOutput: Something new just landed. Explore the redesigned dashboard — see what changed.

testData.expectedOutput: Friendly reminder that items are waiting and creates mild urgency.

testData.expectedOutput: Short, encouraging nudge to complete the daily check-in.

template: Write a SQL query to get {{queryDescription}}.

inputs.queryDescription: all users who signed up in the last 30 days

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';
testData.actualOutput: SELECT * FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days';

inputs.queryDescription: the top 5 products by total revenue this month

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT product_id, SUM(revenue) AS total FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_TRUNC('month', NOW()) GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total DESC LIMIT 5;
testData.actualOutput: SELECT product_id, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE order_date >= DATE_TRUNC('month', CURRENT_DATE) GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

inputs.queryDescription: all active subscriptions that are due to expire in the next 7 days

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT * FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active' AND end_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days';
testData.actualOutput: SELECT * FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active' AND end_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days';

inputs.queryDescription: the count of support tickets grouped by status

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_tickets GROUP BY status;
testData.actualOutput: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS count FROM tickets GROUP BY status;

template: Write a {{dialect}} query to get {{queryDescription}}. Return only {{fields}}. Add a comment explaining the query.

inputs.queryDescription: all users who signed up in the last 30 days

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT id, email, created_at FROM users WHERE created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '30 days'; -- with explanatory comment
testData.actualOutput: SELECT id, email, signup_date FROM users WHERE signup_date BETWEEN CURDATE() - INTERVAL 30 DAY AND CURDATE(); -- Gets users registered in the past month

inputs.queryDescription: the top 5 products by total revenue this month

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT product_id, SUM(revenue) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(NOW()) GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5; -- with explanatory comment
testData.actualOutput:
-- Top 5 revenue-generating products for the current calendar month
SELECT product_id, SUM(amount) AS total_revenue FROM orders WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m-01') GROUP BY product_id ORDER BY total_revenue DESC LIMIT 5;

inputs.queryDescription: all active subscriptions expiring in the next 7 days

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT id, user_id, end_date FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active' AND end_date BETWEEN NOW() AND NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days'; -- with explanatory comment
testData.actualOutput: SELECT id, user_id, plan_name, end_date FROM subscriptions WHERE status = 'active'; -- Active subscriptions

inputs.queryDescription: the count of support tickets grouped by status

testData.expectedOutput: SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_tickets GROUP BY status; -- with explanatory comment
testData.actualOutput:
-- Count of tickets in each status bucket
SELECT status, COUNT(*) AS ticket_count FROM support_tickets GROUP BY status ORDER BY ticket_count DESC;
